## Execution plan

<!--
For large or risky changes — multi-package refactors, database/schema changes,
auth/authz changes, public-API or IPC/protobuf contract changes, infrastructure
changes, production migrations, large dependency upgrades, or anything touching
the pathfinding freeze / protobuf wire contract / Shodan / test-isolation rules
— link or paste the execution plan here. See [.agent/PLANS.md](../.agent/PLANS.md).
Write "N/A" for small, localized changes.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] README.md added/updated for new projects
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] For large/risky changes, an execution plan was created/linked (see [.agent/PLANS.md](../.agent/PLANS.md))
